assertionResults.observation: Public issue #34 and PR #50 exact head 756451101506087b8d73f0c829529159c7afa042 record SDK 42/42 and hosted run 29184758002 covering unequal decimals, inverse and extreme prices, range boundaries, presets, keyboard, mobile, and 200 percent reflow. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: Narrow and wide presets create deterministic editable ranges within the product bin limit.

Public issue #34 and PR #50 exact head 756451101506087b8d73f0c829529159c7afa042 record SDK 42/42 and hosted run 29184758002 covering unequal decimals, inverse and extreme prices, range boundaries, presets, keyboard, mobile, and 200 percent reflow. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: Preset labeling explains concentration and out-of-range exposure without promising returns.

Public issue #34 and PR #50 exact head 756451101506087b8d73f0c829529159c7afa042 record SDK 42/42 and hosted run 29184758002 covering unequal decimals, inverse and extreme prices, range boundaries, presets, keyboard, mobile, and 200 percent reflow. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: Manual edits detach or update the preset state without silently restoring preset bounds.

Public issue #34 and PR #50 exact head 756451101506087b8d73f0c829529159c7afa042 record SDK 42/42 and hosted run 29184758002 covering unequal decimals, inverse and extreme prices, range boundaries, presets, keyboard, mobile, and 200 percent reflow.
